description: Phase3-B25e: CORS fix for qwen3 SSE. Root cause hypothesis: qwen3 JS uses fetch() with credentials:'include', which requires specific origin (not *) and Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true. With ACAO:*, browser CORS policy blocks JS access to response body, causing 0 EventStream events. This is independent of Transfer-Encoding or Content-Length.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: 10th attempt. Does CORS fix allow browser to access response body? Check: (1) Console for CORS errors (should be NONE now), (2) EventStream events > 0, (3) Warning text visible in chat. DB template changed: ACAO: https://chat.qwen.ai + ACAC: true.
services.notes: Phase3-B25e: ONLY DB template change — CORS headers fixed. Code unchanged from B25d (chunked encoding still active). Template reloaded at 18:50 KST. If this works, CORS was the root cause all along (explains ALL 9 previous failures regardless of Content-Length/chunked/timing).

notes: 10th attempt. CORS hypothesis is strong: fetch(credentials:'include') + ACAO:* = browser blocks response body. This would explain 0 EventStream events across all attempts. If this fails, switch to non-SSE approach (JSON error response).
